case_title: XIAO YUE DAI VS. SHANA CHANDRA IDNANI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,311.15 FILED BY DAI, XIAO YUE AS TO DEFENDANT IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DAI, XIAO YUE PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DECLARATION OF SHANA CHANDRA IDNANI RE: CLARIFICATION OF DEFENDANTS LAST NAME. FILED BY DEFENDANT IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF XIAO YUE DAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHANA CHANDRA INDNANI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED [X] DEFENDANT SHOULD BE GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO SEEK OPPORTUNITY FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARACE. FILED BY DEFENDANT IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DAI, XIAO YUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED [X] DEFENDANT SHOULD BE GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO SEEK OPPORTUNITY FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARACE.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF XIAO YUE DAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHANA CHANDRA INDNANI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506))
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAI, XIAO YUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IDNANI, SHANA CHANDRA $1,314.75 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,489.75, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE PLAINTIFF: $1314.75 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. THE COURT REDUCES THE EXCESSIVE SERVICE COSTS. PLAINTIFF MAY DEPOSIT THE CHECK FOR $419.06 PREVIOUSLY RECEIVED FROM THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
